title: Record Voter Turnout Reported in Namakkal
summary: Namakkal district recorded one of the highest voter turnouts in Tamil Nadu assembly elections with strong participation from women, youth, and first-time voters.

title: Polling Concludes Peacefully Across Namakkal
summary: Election polling in Namakkal concluded largely peacefully with heavy security deployment, despite minor incidents reported in a few locations.

title: Security Tightened Post-Poll in Sensitive Areas
summary: Police have intensified patrols and surveillance in sensitive zones of Namakkal to prevent post-election disturbances and ensure law and order.

title: Gold and Silver Prices Fluctuate in Namakkal
summary: Local bullion markets in Namakkal are witnessing daily fluctuations in gold and silver prices following national and global trends.

title: Heatwave Precautions Issued for Residents
summary: Authorities have advised people to avoid peak sunlight hours and stay hydrated as temperatures rise across Namakkal district.

title: Transport Services Resume Normal Operations
summary: Bus and transport services have returned to normal schedules after heavy usage during election polling days.

title: Cleaning Drives Conducted After Election Activities
summary: Municipal teams have started cleanup operations to remove banners, posters, and waste generated during election campaigns.

title: Local Businesses Resume Post-Election Activity
summary: Shops and small businesses in Namakkal are returning to regular operations after temporary slowdowns during election campaigning.
